verses.2: Blessed is the man who does this,
verses.3: Let no foreigner who has joined himself to the LORD speak, saying,
verses.4: For the LORD says, “To the eunuchs who keep my Sabbaths,
verses.5: I will give them in my house and within my walls a memorial and a name better than of sons and of daughters.
verses.6: Also the foreigners who join themselves to the LORD
verses.7: I will bring these to my holy mountain,
verses.8: The Lord GOD, who gathers the outcasts of Israel, says,
verses.9: All you animals of the field,
